_note: Figure provenance. Images extracted (no re-execution) from saved notebook outputs via scripts/extract_notebook_outputs.py. sourceCommit = research repo Grashopr-888/A-comparative-study-… after notebook restoration.

tsne-passt.alt: t-SNE projection of frozen PaSST embeddings on the GMD test set, points coloured by style class, forming broad clusters.
tsne-passt.caption: t-SNE of frozen PaSST embeddings (GMD test set), coloured by style.

tsne-cnn.alt: t-SNE projection of CNN embeddings, points coloured by style class, forming smaller local clusters.
tsne-cnn.caption: t-SNE of the drum-specific CNN embeddings, coloured by style.

cnn-training-curves.alt: Training and validation loss falling and converging over 50 epochs, with validation accuracy rising to about 0.90.
cnn-training-curves.caption: Final CNN (exp 10.1): training/validation loss and validation accuracy over 50 epochs.

cnn-confusion.alt: 74×74 confusion matrix for the final CNN, dominated by a strong diagonal with sparse off-diagonal confusions.
cnn-confusion.caption: Final CNN confusion matrix across all 74 classes — a strong diagonal with sparse, structured confusions.

passt-training-curves.alt: Training and validation loss converging over epochs for the final PaSST model.
passt-training-curves.caption: Final PaSST (exp 11.2): training and validation loss over training.

passt-confusion.alt: 74×74 confusion matrix for the final PaSST model, with a strong diagonal and confusions among related styles.
passt-confusion.caption: Final PaSST confusion matrix across all 74 classes.
